subcodes.first_line: O herald of glad tidings! Thou art ever present in the thoughts of this wanderer and art the object of this prisoner's gaze toward God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت بشیر من همواره در خاطر این آواره ای و منظور نظر این مسجون از خدا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
